---
title: Peer Reviews
listing:
  contents:
    - reviews/prereview.yaml # Scraped from PREreview
    - reviews/pci-rr.yaml # Scraped from PCI RR
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, categories, title]
  field-display-names:
    categories: Collection
  categories: true
  feed: false
comments: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header: reviews/collections.html
---
